questionHtml: The Hubble Space reflecting telescope has a Cassegrain mounting. Outline the main optical difference between a Cassegrain mounting and a Newtonian mounting.
markschemeHtml:
parabolic/convex mirror instead of flat mirror

eyepiece/image axis same as mirror

meta.title: The Hubble Space reflecting telescope has a Cassegrain mounting. Outline the main optical difference between a Cassegrain mounting and a Newtonian mounting.
